raw_consumer_statement:
I was in a bar in a foreign country and they ran a scam where they added extra items and extra XXXX to the bill. Each bill was inflated by 10x Amex ignored my complaint and has illegally charged me for unauthorized charges. 

A secondary issue is that Amex is charging me {$5.00} per month interest on a cash withdrawal I repaid almost immediately. {$5.00} per month amounts to >30 % per annum on the amount withdrawn. This can't be legal. In addition to the {$5.00} " interest '', they charged {$10.00} in " fees '' for a small {$200.00} withdrawal. This makes the first months interest and fees >7.5 %. This must be illegal. The cash advance was paid off back in XXXX.
